title: nowhere
synopsis: Even though I feel like I’m living in the now, here, I think I just end up being in nowhere all the time. And in the nowhere, I find the now and the here. Graduate Work 2022, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Minami no Shima no Chiisana Hikouki Birdy
titleRomaji: Minami no Shima no Chiisana Hikouki Birdy
titleNative: 南の島の小さな飛行機 バーディー
synopsis: This is Bird Paradise Island, a small island in the southern sea. Birdie is a newcomer and small plane that has been working at Bird Paradise Airport on this island for two years. Aiming to become the first airplane someday, he is working day and night on sightseeing flights with his rival Philip, a small helicopter, and his good friend, Annie, a goldfish-shaped helicopter. A small airplane, Birdy, and his funny and unique friends fly fast! (Source: MyAnimeList)

title: Two Down Full Base
synopsis: Based on the children's book by Sunada Hiroshi. Musuke "Shorty" Sato is a shortstop for the local junior baseball team, the Eggs, who is asked by his mother to look after some money for her. He foolishly lends it to Tower and Dump, the school bad-boys, and must enlist the help of the pitcher's pretty little sister. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Son Gokuu Silk Road wo Tobu!!
titleRomaji: Son Gokuu Silk Road wo Tobu!!
titleNative: 孫悟空シルクロードをとぶ!!
synopsis: A TV special that aired as a part of "Nissei Family Special" series on Fuji TV in 1982.

title: Stained Smell
synopsis: My animation expresses the sense of being left behind. It stems from the realities of my childhood and how they did not match up with what I was feeling back then. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Boogerly Love
synopsis: Hanako always watches the other kids play but she is too timid to ask if she can join in. Then one day, Booger Gal rockets out of her and helps her nose into a new life. Graduate Work 2022, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

titleRomaji: Genshin Ten: Tabigokoro no Omomuku Mama ni Kinen Anime
titleNative: 原神展～たびごころの赴くままに～ 記念アニメ
synonyms: 原神×アニメイト 原神展～たびごころの赴くままに～
Genshin x Animate: Genshin Ten - Tabigokoro no Omomuku Mama ni
Genshin Exhibition: Tabigokoro no Omomuku Mama ni Anime
synopsis: A short animation directed by Hideki Inaba to commemorate the start of the Genshin Impact x Animate collaboration event in Japan: the Genshin "Tabigokoro no Omomuku Mama ni" exhibition.

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

title: Arknights - The Daggers' Inheritors
synonyms: Arknights' Original Animation: The Daggers' Inheritors
synopsis: Theresa was assassinated and the Tower of Babel fell. After the nameless soldiers involved in the core assassination mission were eliminated, W's anger was not extinguished yet. Next on the revenge list is a team of Sarkaz mercenaries who provided assistance outside the assassination operation. They were escorting "something" and fleeing to the border... This is a memory that W has never mentioned. It is the epitome of the Sakazi's struggle to survive the long war - the victim will pick up the dagger of the victimizer, and the cycle of destiny will continue. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

synopsis: Short film included as a bonus in the Tongari Boushi no Memole: Marielle no Housekibako compilation OVA.

title: Hell Teacher: Jigoku Sensei Nube (2025)
synonyms: 地獄先生ぬ～べ～ (新アニメ)
synopsis: A new anime project for Jigoku Sensei Nube . The story follows Meisuke Nueno, aka "Nube," a psychic teacher with a demon hand, as he battles evil spirits and monsters to protect his students in this saga that employs elements of Japanese mythology and folklore to tell a fan-pleasing action story. Known for its occult and horror elements on school ghost stories and urban legends, Nube captivated readers across generations with his heroic efforts to save his students from supernatural threats.

tags.name: Youkai

tags.name: Teacher
tags.description: Protagonist is an educator, usually in a school setting.

tags.name: Urban Fantasy
tags.description: Set in a world similar to the real world, but with the existence of magic or other supernatural elements.

tags.name: Episodic
tags.description: Features story arcs that are loosely tied or lack an overarching plot.

tags.name: Demons

tags.name: Exorcism

title: SHIROHIYO - Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother With Memories From My Past Life
titleRomaji: Shirobuta Kizoku desu ga Zense no Kioku ga Haeta node Hiyoko na Otouto Sodatemasu
titleEnglish: SHIROHIYO - Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother With Memories From My Past Life
titleNative: 白豚貴族ですが前世の記憶が生えたので ひよこな弟育てます
synopsis: Ageha Kikunoi was a spoiled 5-year-old before he suddenly recalled memories from a past life. Then, he loved to cook, sew, and sing above all else. In this world, Ageha and his younger brother, Regulus, try to navigate the Kikunoi house as corruption among the aristocracy deepens. They’ll need skills from Ageha’s past life, blessings of gods and elves, and magic spells to help them on their way! (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Gods

tags.name: Disability
tags.description: A work that features one or more characters with a physical, mental, cognitive, or developmental condition that impairs, interferes with, or limits the person's ability to engage in certain tasks or actions.

tags.name: Elf

tags.name: Estranged Family

tags.name: Maids

tags.name: Reincarnation

tags.name: Male Protagonist

title: Inch-High Samurai
synopsis: A collaborative film between Keiichi Tanaami and Nobuhiro Aihara with a new interpretation of the traditional Japanese folk tale.

title: Hannya Shingyou
synopsis: 'There is a fusuma (paper sliding door) work based on the Hannya Shingyo (Prajna-paramita Hrdaya Sutram) by woodblock print artist Shikou Munakata. He wrote the sutra in one go without any rough drafts or scketches and the result is a very powerful and compelling work. Ever since I first saw this fusuma I have had a special interest in the Hannya Shingyo... ' (extract of the commentary by Keiichi Tanaami) (Source: TMDB)

title: Red Shade
synopsis: Keichi Tanaamis new animation work Red Shade (2021) is based on paintings that he had produced on the premise that they will be set in motion. Each of the 80 selected scenes was given a distinct movement of its own, and the edited version of the completed work became the first film. The 80 scenes are each independently complete, and can be freely rearranged. For example, you can start from scent 80 and end in scene one, or arrange them irregularly like 1, 4, 8, 7, and so on. In other words, the essence of the work does not change no matter how the scenes are arranged. Even so, it is possible to produce a strong impact by exchanging the images for each frame, and one can also for instance, create an impression of a refreshing breeze sweeping through the green meadows.

title: TRIP
synopsis: By the maker of Yellow Night. Also an exercise in the storyless and meaningless description of a drawn journey through the subconscious. Hallucination as a cheerful firework display. Made with style and skill, because nonchalance obviously has to be conquered. (Source: IFFR)

title: Yoshi Kei (Prologue)
synopsis: A short film by Keiichi Tanaami.

title: JOCHUM
synopsis: Anime by Sanrio in collaboration with Japanese boy band JO1 .

tags.name: Animals

tags.name: Ensemble Cast
